rationale: The cited paper is about brand-level antecedents of online/offline WOM (e.g., differentiation, excitement, complexity across 613 brands), while the citing paper studies free-shipping promotions, purchase risk mix, returns, and profitability using customer-level panel/field/lab designs. With only a DOI match and no contextual evidence of theory, method, or benchmark reuse, this looks like a likely background/incidental citation rather than a substantive dependency.
